records.question: Who has been enrolled at ucb for at least 6 months?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT person.name FROM person
JOIN enrolled ON person.name = enrolled.name
WHERE enrolled.month >= 6 AND enrolled.school = 'ucb'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT person.name
FROM person
JOIN enrolled ON person.name = enrolled.name
WHERE enrolled.school = 'ucb' AND enrolled.month >= 6

records.question: Who enrolled at occ for at most 1 month?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT person.name FROM person
JOIN enrolled ON person.name = enrolled.name
WHERE enrolled.month <= 1 AND enrolled.school = 'occ'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT person.name
FROM person
JOIN enrolled ON person.name = enrolled.name
WHERE enrolled.school = 'occ' AND enrolled.month <= 1

records.question: Who enrolled at uci exactly in month 2?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT person.name FROM person
JOIN enrolled ON person.name = enrolled.name
WHERE enrolled.month = 2 AND enrolled.school = 'uci'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT person.name
FROM person
JOIN enrolled ON person.name = enrolled.name
WHERE enrolled.school = 'uci' AND enrolled.month = 2
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM enrolled e2
    WHERE e2.name = person.name AND e2.school = 'uci' AND e2.month <> 2
  )
